_note: fetch_vector_db.py downloads https://github.com/<repo>/releases/download/<tag>/<asset> (public, no auth) and extracts into KB/. If you publish under a different repo or tag, change those two fields. Set an explicit 'url' field to override the derived download link entirely. artifact_sha256 pins the pickled artifacts INSIDE the zip: the runtime refuses to unpickle KB files that match neither these pins nor KB/kb_receipt.json (see MCP/server_core/kb_integrity.py). When publishing a new KB release, update these pins alongside the zip sha256 (scripts/receipt_kb.py --print-pins emits them).
